content.en:
As usual.

Ye Tian used these material resources to assist in cultivating the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

Then, he failed again and again, and the replica body was destroyed again and again, but he still insisted on persisting and persevering!

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

One Hundred Archievous!

A thousand primeval eras!

Three thousand primeval eras!

Finally, when the six thousand three hundred and twenty-third primeval era passed, Ye Tian finally became it.

Rumble!!!!

This replica body has been trained into a golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

His physical body is little by little.

Originally, the place where the golden body on the other side of him was transformed into a more perfect body, and the other bodies were also rapidly transforming into a golden body on the other side, constantly drawing on various energies to accelerate the process.

Ye Tian knew very well that as long as he cultivated slowly, his whole body could be transformed into a golden body on the other side, and it was the most perfect golden body on the other side, the kind that was complete on the other side, without a single flaw.

Endless energy poured in all around, and all kinds of resources were devoured by him.

Endless resources and energy have been turned into nutrients for the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

And this kind of evolutionary transformation took two primeval epochs, which allowed his body to completely complete the golden embodiment on the other side.

"The heart of the other side, the golden blood of the other side, the golden bones of the other side, plus the complete golden body of the other side, now my golden body on the other side is the most complete and perfect one!"

Ye Tian could feel the strength of this body, far beyond the past.

Now, if he fights with the Lord of Tiandu again, if he cultivates to the same level, he can easily defeat the other party.

Next, he carefully studied the mystery of the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

Soon, he found that after the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang was practiced, he still had a hole card.

......

The land of eternity, an empty area.

Ye Tian came here and prepared to test this hole card.

Rumble!!!!

He urged the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, and the golden light that was sharp to the extreme, like substance, diffused all around.

"Xuanyang Jinmang!"

Airplanes!

An unimaginable golden ray of sharp edge instantly pierced the void of the land of eternity, shattering countless voids, and the long territory seemed to be directly penetrated by this blow.

"A terrible blow!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

But the consumption of this move is very large, and it will make the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang dim.

In order to test the limits of this move, he bought a special ingredient - the Immortal Gold of the Other Side!

This piece of immortal gold on the other side is not big, and it is the size of a basketball.

The reason why he bought this material was because this kind of Beyond Immortal Gold was indestructible, and even a Peer-level genius of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm could hardly destroy it.

Although he is now only a seventh-time bone transformation realm of the other side level genius, he has cultivated a complete other side of the golden body, if he casts the Xuanyang Golden Mang, see if there is any hope of penetrating the other side of the immortal gold.

If he could do that, he would now have the hope of defeating the Eight Bone Transformation Realm's other level geniuses.

He put this piece of Immortal Gold on the other side in the void, and then began to cast the Xuanyang Golden Mang.

He burst out with all his strength and unleashed the Xuanyang sword.

Rumble!

Xuanyang Golden Mang crossed the other side of the immortal gold.

The next moment.

On the other side, the immortal gold turned into pieces.

"Xuanyang Jin Mang actually broke the Immortal Gold on the other side, in this way, even if the eighth Bone Transformation Realm other side level genius casts a defensive supernatural power technique, he will be pierced by me with one blow, and he will be hit hard!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, Xuanyang Jinmang has become his strongest hole card.

However, this strongest hole card can only be cast twice, and once it is cast twice, the Golden Body on the other side will not be able to be used again, and it will take a long time to repair.

But.

He could copy his body again and again, and if several copied bodies shot together, it was enough to easily kill a genius of the other side of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm.

Now, his strength is strong, and he is naturally in a good mood.

In these years, he has not only practiced the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

He also found more high-grade eternal gold in the ruins on the other side.

"It's about more than six thousand pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, and in the future, even if it is used to build a magic circle to comprehend the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, it can be used six times!" Ye Tian said darkly.

These more than 6,000 pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, he did not expose them, he directly left them on his body, and waited until he was using them in the future.

......

On the other side, there is a special void.

Ye Tian's other replica body is still here to comprehend the Origin Fragment of the Eternal Shore.

However, after his repeated enlightenment, the speed of the origin escape was much faster.

At this rate, this piece of debris won't last long.

But Ye Tian didn't care, he continued to comprehend.

Now, he was close to realizing the rules of the Origin.

Hundreds of primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of Origin Rules, making the surrounding voids tremble.

"Successfully comprehended the rules of the origin!"

However, what he comprehended this time was only the ordinary Origin Rules, not the Origin Rules of the other side.

If he was only an ancient-level genius, once he waited until his cultivation had broken through to the extreme of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, he would be able to go to the Origin Realm.

However, he was a genius at the other side, so he had to comprehend the rules of the Origin of the Other Shore before he could completely impact the Origin Realm.

Of course.

Just because he understood the rules of origin doesn't mean it's useless.

First of all, his strength has skyrocketed!

If the attack power is blessed with the original rule, it will burst out with extremely terrifying combat power.

And.

He can also craft Origin Rule weapons!

In the land of the Eternal Shore, the value of the Origin Rule weapon is higher than that of the high-ranking Divine Soldiers.

Strictly speaking, the Origin Rule weapon is just an enhanced version of the high-level Divine Weapon on the other side.

If you want to train into an Origin Rule weapon, the prerequisite is to first become a high-level Origin Casting Master, and then use the Origin Rules to forge a high-level Origin Divine Power.

Of course.

In order to be able to carry the power of the origin, the materials required must naturally be more advanced, otherwise the high-level divine weapons on the other side will be shattered.

"Next, buy some materials to use to craft Origin Rules weapons. Once it is successfully built, I am afraid that I can easily slaughter a genius of the other side of the eight-stage bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

As for the materials suitable for creating Origin Rule weapons, Gu Heng Mountain will have some, but if you want to get them together, you have to find the Eternal Night Pavilion.

"There's no way, I'll have to go to the Eternal Night Pavilion again and buy a batch of materials with some high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold. The Eternal Night Pavilion is mainly business, and it will definitely do this business!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He once again sent the vest of the Lord of the Winter Yuan to the Eternal Night Pavilion Branch.
